violations.detail: Section 'builder' (line 55) appears before 'add' (line 62). Required order is: factory -> instance -> add -> builder -> aria -> events -> api -> internal.
No 'factory' section exists. The comment at line 39 says 'No factory methods here!' but a factory section separator is conventionally still present (even if empty with a comment).
No 'factory' section exists. The comment at line 49 says 'No factory methods here!' but a factory section separator is conventionally still present (even if empty with a comment).
No 'factory' section exists. The comment at line 60 says 'No factory methods here!' but a factory section separator is conventionally still present (even if empty with a comment).

lookupComponent() is called inside an onClick lambda registered in the constructor. While this is technically safe (the lambda executes only after DOM attachment), the pattern is worth noting for consistency review.
